Meeting New Friends.name: Friendship Storybook
Meeting New Friends.overview: Create a simple storybook with pictures that students can use to point to and describe new friends.
Meeting New Friends.general_objective: Develop social interaction skills and early literacy through story creation.
specific_objectives: Work together on storybooks and name tags
Use pictures to tell simple stories
Meeting New Friends.technology_integration: Use digital or electronic storybooks to look at pictures.

Meeting New Friends.name: Role-play Greetings
Meeting New Friends.overview: Practice greetings and polite phrases through role-play activities.
Meeting New Friends.general_objective: Develop verbal communication skills through dramatic play.

Meeting New Friends.name: Name Tag Art
Meeting New Friends.overview: Design and decorate name tags for each student, practicing introductions.
Meeting New Friends.general_objective: Develop self-identity recognition and fine motor skills.
Meeting New Friends.technology_integration: Create digital name tags with photos.

Exploring Our Classroom.name: Color and Label My Classroom
Exploring Our Classroom.overview: Create a colorful classroom poster labeling objects.
Exploring Our Classroom.general_objective: Develop classroom vocabulary and color recognition.
Exploring Our Classroom.technology_integration: Use digital cameras or drawing tools to create classroom posters.

Exploring Our Classroom.name: Classroom Object Scavenger Hunt
Exploring Our Classroom.overview: Look for specific classroom items, name them, and label each one with support.
Exploring Our Classroom.general_objective: Develop observation skills and object vocabulary.
Exploring Our Classroom.technology_integration: Use tablets to take photos of found objects.

Exploring Our Classroom.name: Digital Classroom Tour
Exploring Our Classroom.overview: Create a virtual tour by taking photos of classroom objects.
Exploring Our Classroom.general_objective: Develop basic technology skills and spatial awareness.
Exploring Our Classroom.technology_integration: Create digital tour with photos and simple labels.

Me and My Family.name: My Family Tree
Me and My Family.overview: Create a family tree with drawings, pictures, and names of family members.
Me and My Family.general_objective: Develop family vocabulary and personal identity.
Me and My Family.technology_integration: Use family tree apps or create digital version.

Me and My Family.name: Family Role Play
Me and My Family.overview: Act out different family members and their roles.
Me and My Family.general_objective: Develop understanding of family roles through play.

Me and My Family.name: Family Drawing Gallery
Me and My Family.overview: Draw and label pictures of family members to display in class.
Me and My Family.general_objective: Develop artistic expression and family vocabulary.
Me and My Family.technology_integration: Create digital gallery with scanned drawings.

Let's Eat!.name: Favorite Fruits & Vegetables Collage
Let's Eat!.overview: Create a collage of favorite fruits and vegetables.
Let's Eat!.general_objective: Develop food vocabulary and healthy eating awareness.
Let's Eat!.technology_integration: Create digital collage with food images.

Let's Eat!.name: Food Sorting Game
Let's Eat!.overview: Sort fruits and vegetables by color or taste.
Let's Eat!.general_objective: Develop classification skills and food vocabulary.
Let's Eat!.technology_integration: Use tablet to sort food digitally.

Let's Eat!.name: Food Tasting Video
Let's Eat!.overview: Record a simple video tasting fruits and saying their names.
Let's Eat!.general_objective: Develop oral language and technology skills.
Let's Eat!.technology_integration: Record and edit simple tasting videos.

Numbers Around Me.name: Count & Match Game
Numbers Around Me.overview: Create a matching game to pair objects with numbers from one to five.
Numbers Around Me.general_objective: Develop early numeracy and matching skills.

Numbers Around Me.name: Counting Objects Collage
Numbers Around Me.overview: Draw and label objects to match a number.
Numbers Around Me.general_objective: Connect numbers with quantities through art.

Numbers Around Me.name: Digital Counting App
Numbers Around Me.overview: Use a digital counting app to practice numbers and matching quantities.
Numbers Around Me.general_objective: Develop technology skills and number recognition.

Fun with Letters.name: Alphabet Letter Hunt
Fun with Letters.overview: Find objects around the classroom that start with letters A, B, and C.
Fun with Letters.general_objective: Develop letter recognition and initial sound awareness.
specific_objectives: Find objects with matching initial sounds
Fun with Letters.technology_integration: Use tablet to take photos of letter objects.

Fun with Letters.name: Letter Collage
Fun with Letters.overview: Create an alphabet collage by cutting and pasting letters from magazines.
Fun with Letters.general_objective: Develop letter recognition through hands-on art.

Fun with Letters.name: Digital Alphabet Book
Fun with Letters.overview: Create an online alphabet book using photos of objects.
Fun with Letters.general_objective: Develop digital literacy and alphabet knowledge.

Inside My School!.name: Introducing People in my Classroom
Inside My School!.overview: Create a video introducing different people on their school.
Inside My School!.general_objective: Develop communication skills and school community awareness.

Inside My School!.name: Classroom, Faces, and Things Poster
Inside My School!.overview: Design a poster of people and things in the classroom.
Inside My School!.general_objective: Develop classroom vocabulary and visual representation skills.
Inside My School!.technology_integration: Take photos to describe parts of the classroom.

Inside My School!.name: Classroom Comic Journal
Inside My School!.overview: Create a three-panel comic book story about people and things in the classroom.
Inside My School!.general_objective: Develop storytelling skills and classroom vocabulary.
Inside My School!.technology_integration: Create digital comic using simple apps.

Panama's Plants and Animals.name: Panama's Animal Safari
Panama's Plants and Animals.overview: Create a 'safari' by identifying and naming local animals and plants.
Panama's Plants and Animals.general_objective: Develop nature vocabulary and observation skills.

Panama's Plants and Animals.name: Nature Drawing
Panama's Plants and Animals.overview: Draw and label pictures of Panama's animals and plants.
Panama's Plants and Animals.general_objective: Develop artistic skills and nature vocabulary.

Panama's Plants and Animals.name: Photo Nature Guide
Panama's Plants and Animals.overview: Describe photos of plants and animals in Panama.
Panama's Plants and Animals.general_objective: Develop descriptive language and digital skills.
